3293910.name: 梦境少女demo
3293910.description: DreamKiller is a 2D side-scrolling action game that combines strategy cards with intense combat. Control Irene as she navigates a world where dreams and reality merge, piecing together the shattered Dream Interpretation Codex. Use card-switching to unleash powerful skills in a Souls-like challenge.
3293910.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
publishers: 游龙翼道软件开发工作室
